message:
test(proptest): add 20 property-based tests for code_scanner

Covers FindingSeverity ordering/serde, ScanTotals arithmetic invariants,
ScanFinding/ScannerSummary/ScanReport serde roundtrips, ScanClassification
precedence rules (Critical > HighWarning > Warning > Clean), monotonicity,
forward-compatibility with unknown JSON fields, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
